requirement_topic.en: Care Labelling (FTC Care Labeling Rule, 16 CFR Part 423)
requirement_topic.zh: 洗涤护理标签（FTC《护理标签规则》，16 CFR第423部分）
requirement_topic.zht: 洗滌護理標籤（FTC《護理標籤規則》，16 CFR第423部分）

summary.en: The FTC Care Labeling Rule (16 CFR Part 423) requires that all textile wearing apparel and certain piece goods sold in the US bear a permanent care label that: (1) is attached at purchase and remains attached during the useful life of the product; (2) provides at least one regular method of care (washing or dry cleaning instructions) using the ASTM D5489 care symbols or written English instructions; (3) warns against any care procedure that would damage the garment (e.g., 'Do not bleach'); (4) is legible and placed where the consumer can find it. If only one method of care is safe, only that method must be stated. Care instructions must be in English; symbols (ASTM D5489 / ISO 3758) are also accepted. Labels must be permanent and readable for the life of the garment. The rule was last significantly updated in 2014. Exceptions exist for certain items (e.g., completely washable items with no instruction needed, reversible garments).
summary.zh: FTC《护理标签规则》（16 CFR第423部分）要求所有在美国销售的纺织服装及部分零布须附有永久性护理标签，满足以下要求：（1）在购买时附上并在产品使用寿命期间持续附着；（2）使用ASTM D5489护理符号或英文书面说明，提供至少一种常规护理方式（洗涤或干洗说明）；（3）对可能损坏服装的护理方式发出警告（如"不可漂白"）；（4）字迹清晰，放置在消费者易于找到的位置。如果只有一种护理方式是安全的，则只需说明该方式。护理说明须以英文标注；亦可使用符号（ASTM D5489 / ISO 3758）。标签须永久且在服装使用寿命内清晰可读。该规则最近一次重大修订为2014年。部分物品有例外情况（如完全可水洗且无需说明的物品、可翻转服装）。
summary.zht: FTC《護理標籤規則》（16 CFR第423部分）要求所有在美國銷售的紡織服裝及部分零布須附有永久性護理標籤，滿足以下要求：（1）在購買時附上並在產品使用壽命期間持續附著；（2）使用ASTM D5489護理符號或英文書面說明，提供至少一種常規護理方式（洗滌或乾洗說明）；（3）對可能損壞服裝的護理方式發出警告（如「不可漂白」）；（4）字跡清晰，放置在消費者易於找到的位置。如果只有一種護理方式是安全的，則只需說明該方式。護理說明須以英文標注；亦可使用符號（ASTM D5489 / ISO 3758）。標籤須永久且在服裝使用壽命內清晰可讀。該規則最近一次重大修訂為2014年。部分物品有例外情況（如完全可水洗且無需說明的物品、可翻轉服裝）。

standards_or_laws: 16 CFR Part 423 — Care Labeling of Textile Wearing Apparel and Certain Piece Goods (FTC Care Labeling Rule)
ASTM D5489 — Standard Guide for Care Symbols for Care Instructions on Textile Products

summary.en: China requires care labelling under GB/T 8685-2008 (Textiles — Care labelling code using symbols), which aligns with ISO 3758 symbols. Chinese domestic garments typically carry GINETEX/ISO-based symbols plus Chinese written instructions. While the symbol set is similar to US ASTM D5489, China does not require English-language care instructions, and Chinese care labels alone do not include the RN/company disclosure or English warnings required by the FTC rule. Chinese export garments often carry ISO symbol-based care labels that partially overlap with US requirements but are not fully compliant.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 8685-2008（纺织品——使用符号的保养标签规程）要求标注护理标签，与ISO 3758符号体系一致。中国国内服装通常附有GINETEX/ISO符号加中文文字说明。虽然符号体系与美国ASTM D5489相近，但中国不要求英文护理说明，且中国护理标签本身不包含FTC规则要求的RN/公司披露或英文警告。出口服装通常附有基于ISO符号的护理标签，与美国要求部分重叠，但不完全合规。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 8685-2008（紡織品——使用符號的保養標籤規程）要求標注護理標籤，與ISO 3758符號體系一致。中國國內服裝通常附有GINETEX/ISO符號加中文文字說明。雖然符號體系與美國ASTM D5489相近，但中國不要求英文護理說明，且中國護理標籤本身不包含FTC規則要求的RN/公司披露或英文警告。出口服裝通常附有基於ISO符號的護理標籤，與美國要求部分重疊，但不完全合規。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 8685-2008 — Textiles — Care labelling code using symbols (aligned with ISO 3758)

gap.en: Chinese garments exported to the US must add or replace care labels with FTC-compliant versions: English-language instructions (or ASTM D5489 symbols with English warnings), permanently attached, readable for the garment's life. Chinese ISO-symbol labels are partially compatible (ASTM D5489 and ISO 3758 share most symbols) but must be verified against ASTM D5489 specifically. Any Chinese-only text instructions are non-compliant. Labels combined with fibre content and country-of-origin (required simultaneously under 16 CFR 303) are the standard practice. Manufacturers should verify their specific care instructions are tested and supportable.
gap.zh: 出口美国的中国服装须添加或替换符合FTC要求的护理标签：英文说明（或ASTM D5489符号加英文警告），永久缝附，在服装使用寿命内清晰可读。中国ISO符号标签与美国要求部分相容（ASTM D5489与ISO 3758大部分符号相同），但须专门对照ASTM D5489核验。仅有中文文字说明的标签不合规。标签通常与纤维成分及原产地信息（依据16 CFR 303同步要求）合并标注，是行业通行做法。制造商应核实其具体护理说明已经过测试且可支撑声明。
gap.zht: 出口美國的中國服裝須添加或替換符合FTC要求的護理標籤：英文說明（或ASTM D5489符號加英文警告），永久縫附，在服裝使用壽命內清晰可讀。中國ISO符號標籤與美國要求部分相容（ASTM D5489與ISO 3758大部分符號相同），但須專門對照ASTM D5489核驗。僅有中文文字說明的標籤不合規。標籤通常與纖維成分及原產地資訊（依據16 CFR 303同步要求）合併標注，是行業通行做法。製造商應核實其具體護理說明已經過測試且可支撐聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FTC enforcement under 16 CFR Part 423; applies to all textile wearing apparel and certain piece goods sold in the US; CBP enforces at importation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 8685-2008 under SAC framework; Chinese-only care labels do not substitute for FTC-compliant labels

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FTC care labelling under 16 CFR Part 423 is mandatory for all textile wearing apparel sold in the US. Chinese GB/T 8685 ISO-symbol labels partially overlap with US requirements but must be verified against ASTM D5489 and must include English-language instructions or warnings. Permanently attached, English-language (or ASTM D5489 symbol) care labels are required before US market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据16 CFR第423部分的FTC护理标签为所有在美销售纺织服装的强制要求。中国GB/T 8685 ISO符号标签与美国要求部分重叠，但须对照ASTM D5489核验，且须包含英文说明或警告。进入美国市场前，须附上永久缝附的英文（或ASTM D5489符号）护理标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據16 CFR第423部分的FTC護理標籤為所有在美銷售紡織服裝的強制要求。中國GB/T 8685 ISO符號標籤與美國要求部分重疊，但須對照ASTM D5489核驗，且須包含英文說明或警告。進入美國市場前，須附上永久縫附的英文（或ASTM D5489符號）護理標籤。
